description: Optional external hero-item build rows for improving simulator compatibility when Statlocker/Liquipedia/exported build data is available. This file is intentionally data-only so new rows can be added without changing Python code.

fields.source_url: URL where the row was gathered
fields.hero_name: hero display name matching API metadata
fields.item_name: item display name matching API metadata
fields.purchase_rate: 0..1 proportion of builds/matches where the item appears for this hero
fields.win_rate: 0..1 win rate for hero+item when available
fields.wpa: win probability added / win-rate delta from source when available
fields.avg_buy_time_s: average purchase time in seconds when available
fields.compatibility_label: strong | neutral | weak, optional curated label when exact statistics are unavailable
